using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Transactions;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Comparison;

/// <summary>
/// Implémente les règles de comparaison CBP / FXSentry (cf. docs/SPEC-verification.md).
/// Les tolérances encodent la notion de « différence justifiable » : en deçà, aucun écart.
/// </summary>
public sealed class TransactionComparer : ITransactionComparer
{
    // Tolérances métier.
    private const decimal RateRatioTolerance = 0.0001m;   // 1E-4 sur le RATIO des taux (tradeRate / FX)
    private const decimal AmountRatioTolerance = 0.01m;   // 1E-2 sur le RATIO des montants (cbp / FX)
    private const decimal MarginTolerance = 0.00000001m;  // 1E-8 sur les marges (écart absolu)

    // Mapping status CBP -> ACTIVE_TRADE_STATUS FXSentry.
    private static readonly Dictionary<string, int> StatusMap = new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
    {
        ["TRADE_DONE"] = 1,
        ["RFQ Cancelled"] = 0,
    };

    // Mapping channelId CBP -> ORIGINAL_MASTER FXSentry.
    private static readonly Dictionary<string, int> ChannelMap = new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
    {
        ["WEB"] = 293,
        ["SDP"] = 295,
    };

    private const string SdpChannel = "SDP";

    public IReadOnlyList<string> Compare(CbpTransaction cbp, IReadOnlyList<FxSentryTransaction> fxRowsByValueDate)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(cbp);
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(fxRowsByValueDate);

        var fields = new List<string>();
        if (fxRowsByValueDate.Count == 0)
        {
            return fields;
        }

        var near = fxRowsByValueDate[0];
        var far = fxRowsByValueDate.Count > 1 ? fxRowsByValueDate[1] : null;

        CompareHeader(cbp, near, far, fields);

        CompareLeg(cbp.NearLeg, near, cbp.TradeAction, isFarLeg: false, prefix: string.Empty, fields);

        if (cbp.FarLeg is not null)
        {
            if (far is null)
            {
                fields.Add("farDateDetail"); // swap CBP mais une seule ligne FXSentry
            }
            else
            {
                CompareLeg(cbp.FarLeg, far, cbp.TradeAction, isFarLeg: true, prefix: "farDateDetail.", fields);
            }
        }

        return fields;
    }

    private static void CompareHeader(CbpTransaction cbp, FxSentryTransaction near, FxSentryTransaction? far, List<string> fields)
    {
        // status
        if (!StatusMap.TryGetValue(cbp.Status, out var expectedStatus) || expectedStatus != near.ActiveTradeStatus)
        {
            fields.Add("status");
        }

        // symbol : Cur1Cur2 attendu = BaseCcy + Currency (résolus via sCcyCross).
        var expectedSymbol = near.CrossBaseCode + near.CrossCurrencyCode;
        if (!string.Equals(cbp.Symbol, expectedSymbol, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            fields.Add("symbol");
        }

        // tradeAction : cohérence du sens via les devises BUY/SELL vs BASE_CODE.
        var tradeActionOk = CurrencyDirectionOk(cbp.TradeAction.LegSide(isFarLeg: false), near);
        if (cbp.IsSwap && far is not null)
        {
            tradeActionOk &= CurrencyDirectionOk(cbp.TradeAction.LegSide(isFarLeg: true), far);
        }

        if (!tradeActionOk)
        {
            fields.Add("tradeAction");
        }

        // notionalCurrency
        if (!string.Equals(cbp.NotionalCurrency, near.SetCurrency, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            fields.Add("notionalCurrency");
        }

        // userNm : comparé uniquement si la provenance est SDP (JavaBankTrader).
        if (string.Equals(cbp.ChannelId, SdpChannel, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            && !string.Equals(Normalize(cbp.UserNm), Normalize(near.UserId), StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            fields.Add("userNm");
        }

        // customerRef
        if (!string.Equals(cbp.CustomerRef, near.CustomerCode, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            fields.Add("customerRef");
        }

        // channelId
        if (!ChannelMap.TryGetValue(cbp.ChannelId, out var expectedChannel) || expectedChannel != near.OriginalMaster)
        {
            fields.Add("channelId");
        }

        // comment
        if (!string.Equals(Normalize(cbp.Comment), Normalize(near.Remark), StringComparison.Ordinal))
        {
            fields.Add("comment");
        }
    }

    private static void CompareLeg(CbpLeg leg, FxSentryTransaction row, CbpTradeAction action, bool isFarLeg, string prefix, List<string> fields)
    {
        // tradeRate (taux inversé si CROSS_FLIPPED).
        if (!RatesMatch(leg.TradeRate, row))
        {
            fields.Add(prefix + "tradeRate");
        }

        // valueDate
        if (leg.ValueDate != row.ValueDate)
        {
            fields.Add(prefix + "valueDate");
        }

        // tradeDate : tolérée J ou J+1 (rollover CBP plus tôt que FXSentry).
        if (leg.TradeDate != row.TradeDate && leg.TradeDate != row.TradeDate.AddDays(1))
        {
            fields.Add(prefix + "tradeDate");
        }

        var side = action.LegSide(isFarLeg);

        // currency1Amt (devise de base) : B => SELL_AMOUNT, S => BUY_AMOUNT. Tolérance sur le ratio.
        var fxCur1 = side == LegSide.Buy ? row.SellAmount : row.BuyAmount;
        if (!WithinRatioTolerance(leg.Currency1Amt, fxCur1, AmountRatioTolerance))
        {
            fields.Add(prefix + "currency1Amt");
        }

        // currency2Amt : B => BUY_AMOUNT, S => SELL_AMOUNT. Tolérance sur le ratio.
        var fxCur2 = side == LegSide.Buy ? row.BuyAmount : row.SellAmount;
        if (!WithinRatioTolerance(leg.Currency2Amt, fxCur2, AmountRatioTolerance))
        {
            fields.Add(prefix + "currency2Amt");
        }

        // salesMargin (formule inversée si CROSS_FLIPPED).
        if (!MarginsMatch(leg.SalesMargin, row))
        {
            fields.Add(prefix + "salesMargin");
        }
    }

    private static bool CurrencyDirectionOk(LegSide side, FxSentryTransaction row) => side == LegSide.Buy
        ? string.Equals(row.SellCurrency, row.CrossBaseCode, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
        : string.Equals(row.BuyCurrency, row.CrossBaseCode, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    private static bool RatesMatch(decimal cbpRate, FxSentryTransaction row)
    {
        if (row.FxRate == 0m)
        {
            return false;
        }

        // CROSS_FLIPPED : on compare au taux INVERSÉ (1/FX_RATE). Tolérance sur le ratio (≈ écart relatif).
        var expectedRate = row.CrossFlipped ? 1m / row.FxRate : row.FxRate;
        return WithinRatioTolerance(cbpRate, expectedRate, RateRatioTolerance);
    }

    private static bool MarginsMatch(decimal cbpMargin, FxSentryTransaction row)
    {
        if (!row.CrossFlipped)
        {
            return Math.Abs(cbpMargin - row.FxSpread) <= MarginTolerance;
        }

        var baseRate = row.FxRate - row.FxSpread;
        if (row.FxRate == 0m || baseRate == 0m)
        {
            return false;
        }

        // SpreadFlipped = (1 / AllInRate) - (1 / BaseRate)
        var spreadFlipped = (1m / row.FxRate) - (1m / baseRate);
        return Math.Abs(cbpMargin - spreadFlipped) <= MarginTolerance;
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Compare <paramref name="cbpValue"/> à <paramref name="fxValue"/> via le ratio (cbp / fx) :
    /// pas d'écart si |ratio − 1| ≤ <paramref name="tolerance"/>. Si fx = 0, égalité ssi cbp = 0
    /// (évite la division par zéro).
    /// </summary>
    private static bool WithinRatioTolerance(decimal cbpValue, decimal fxValue, decimal tolerance)
    {
        if (fxValue == 0m)
        {
            return cbpValue == 0m;
        }

        return Math.Abs((cbpValue / fxValue) - 1m) <= tolerance;
    }

    private static string Normalize(string? value) => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? string.Empty : value.Trim();
}




























using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Comparison;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Transactions;
using IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.TestSupport;
using Xunit;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.SharedKernel;

public sealed class TransactionComparerTests
{
    private readonly TransactionComparer _comparer = new();

    [Fact]
    public void When_Everything_Matches_Then_No_Difference()
    {
        // Arrange
        var cbp = TransactionTestData.Cbp();
        var fx = TransactionTestData.Fx();

        // Act
        var fields = _comparer.Compare(cbp, [fx]);

        // Assert
        Assert.Empty(fields);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void Status_TradeDone_Vs_Cancelled_Is_Reported()
    {
        // Arrange
        var cbp = TransactionTestData.Cbp();
        var fx = TransactionTestData.Fx() with { ActiveTradeStatus = 0 };

        // Act
        var fields = _comparer.Compare(cbp, [fx]);

        // Assert
        Assert.Contains("status", fields);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void Symbol_Built_From_Cross_Codes()
    {
        // Arrange
        var cbp = TransactionTestData.Cbp() with { Symbol = "EURCAD" };
        var fx = TransactionTestData.Fx();

        // Act
        var fields = _comparer.Compare(cbp, [fx]);

        // Assert
        Assert.Contains("symbol", fields);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void TradeAction_Buy_Requires_SellCurrency_Equals_BaseCode()
    {
        // Arrange — Buy => la banque vend la devise de base : SELL_CURRENCY doit == BASE_CODE.
        var cbp = TransactionTestData.Cbp();
        var fx = TransactionTestData.Fx() with { SellCurrency = "CAD" };

        // Act
        var fields = _comparer.Compare(cbp, [fx]);

        // Assert
        Assert.Contains("tradeAction", fields);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void Rate_Difference_Below_Tolerance_Is_Ignored()
    {
        // Arrange — |ratio − 1| ≈ 3.7E-6 ≤ 1E-4.
        var cbp = TransactionTestData.Cbp();
        cbp = cbp with { NearLeg = cbp.NearLeg with { TradeRate = 1.355560m } };
        var fx = TransactionTestData.Fx();

        // Act
        var fields = _comparer.Compare(cbp, [fx]);

        // Assert
        Assert.DoesNotContain("tradeRate", fields);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void Rate_Difference_Above_Tolerance_Is_Reported()
    {
        // Arrange — |ratio − 1| ≈ 1.1E-3 > 1E-4.
        var cbp = TransactionTestData.Cbp();
        cbp = cbp with { NearLeg = cbp.NearLeg with { TradeRate = 1.357m } };
        var fx = TransactionTestData.Fx();

        // Act
        var fields = _comparer.Compare(cbp, [fx]);

        // Assert
        Assert.Contains("tradeRate", fields);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void Rate_And_Margin_Are_Inverted_When_CrossFlipped()
    {
        // Arrange — taux attendu = 1/FxRate, marge attendue = formule flipped.
        var cbp = TransactionTestData.Cbp();
        cbp = cbp with { NearLeg = cbp.NearLeg with { TradeRate = 0.5m, SalesMargin = (1m / 2m) - (1m / (2m - 0.5m)) } };
        var fx = TransactionTestData.Fx() with { CrossFlipped = true, FxRate = 2m, FxSpread = 0.5m };

        // Act
        var fields = _comparer.Compare(cbp, [fx]);

        // Assert
        Assert.DoesNotContain("tradeRate", fields);
        Assert.DoesNotContain("salesMargin", fields);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void SalesMargin_Raw_Value_Is_Rejected_When_CrossFlipped()
    {
        // Arrange — avec CROSS_FLIPPED, la marge attendue est INVERSÉE, pas FX_SPREAD brut.
        var cbp = TransactionTestData.Cbp();
        cbp = cbp with { NearLeg = cbp.NearLeg with { TradeRate = 0.5m, SalesMargin = 0.5m } };
        var fx = TransactionTestData.Fx() with { CrossFlipped = true, FxRate = 2m, FxSpread = 0.5m };

        // Act
        var fields = _comparer.Compare(cbp, [fx]);

        // Assert
        Assert.Contains("salesMargin", fields);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void Currency1Amt_Buy_Compares_With_SellAmount()
    {
        // Arrange — écart relatif ≈ 3.2% > 1E-2 (3000 vs 3100).
        var cbp = TransactionTestData.Cbp();
        var fx = TransactionTestData.Fx() with { SellAmount = 3100m };

        // Act
        var fields = _comparer.Compare(cbp, [fx]);

        // Assert
        Assert.Contains("currency1Amt", fields);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void Currency2Amt_Buy_Compares_With_BuyAmount()
    {
        // Arrange — écart relatif ≈ 3.2% > 1E-2 (4065 vs 4200).
        var cbp = TransactionTestData.Cbp();
        var fx = TransactionTestData.Fx() with { BuyAmount = 4200m };

        // Act
        var fields = _comparer.Compare(cbp, [fx]);

        // Assert
        Assert.Contains("currency2Amt", fields);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void Amount_Within_Ratio_Tolerance_Is_Ignored()
    {
        // Arrange — écart relatif ≈ 0.5% ≤ 1E-2 (3000 vs 3015), bien que l'écart absolu (15) soit grand.
        var cbp = TransactionTestData.Cbp();
        var fx = TransactionTestData.Fx() with { SellAmount = 3015m };

        // Act
        var fields = _comparer.Compare(cbp, [fx]);

        // Assert
        Assert.DoesNotContain("currency1Amt", fields);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void TradeDate_NextDay_Is_Tolerated_Rollover()
    {
        // Arrange — CBP daté J+1 (rollover).
        var cbp = TransactionTestData.Cbp();
        cbp = cbp with { NearLeg = cbp.NearLeg with { TradeDate = TransactionTestData.TradeDate.AddDays(1) } };
        var fx = TransactionTestData.Fx();

        // Act
        var fields = _comparer.Compare(cbp, [fx]);

        // Assert
        Assert.DoesNotContain("tradeDate", fields);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void TradeDate_TwoDaysApart_Is_Reported()
    {
        // Arrange
        var cbp = TransactionTestData.Cbp();
        cbp = cbp with { NearLeg = cbp.NearLeg with { TradeDate = TransactionTestData.TradeDate.AddDays(2) } };
        var fx = TransactionTestData.Fx();

        // Act
        var fields = _comparer.Compare(cbp, [fx]);

        // Assert
        Assert.Contains("tradeDate", fields);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void UserNm_Is_Compared_When_Channel_Is_Sdp()
    {
        // Arrange
        var cbp = TransactionTestData.Cbp() with { UserNm = "autre.user" };
        var fx = TransactionTestData.Fx();

        // Act
        var fields = _comparer.Compare(cbp, [fx]);

        // Assert
        Assert.Contains("userNm", fields);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void UserNm_Is_Not_Compared_When_Channel_Is_Web()
    {
        // Arrange — canal WEB : userNm n'est pas comparé.
        var cbp = TransactionTestData.Cbp() with { ChannelId = "WEB", UserNm = "autre.user" };
        var fx = TransactionTestData.Fx() with { OriginalMaster = 293 };

        // Act
        var fields = _comparer.Compare(cbp, [fx]);

        // Assert
        Assert.DoesNotContain("userNm", fields);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void ChannelId_Web_Maps_To_293()
    {
        // Arrange — CBP WEB attend ORIGINAL_MASTER 293 ; ici la ligne FX est 295 (SDP).
        var cbp = TransactionTestData.Cbp() with { ChannelId = "WEB" };
        var fx = TransactionTestData.Fx();

        // Act
        var fields = _comparer.Compare(cbp, [fx]);

        // Assert
        Assert.Contains("channelId", fields);
    }
}
